# Acerte a Mosca

> Free online browser gaming platform with 13 arcade and casual games. No downloads required. Play on mobile or desktop.

## About

Acerte a Mosca (English: Nailed the Fly) is a free-to-play browser gaming platform featuring retro pixel art games, created by MMSoft Digital (Alex Marra). Built with Next.js and Pixi.js, the site supports Portuguese (BR) and English, with real-time online multiplayer for select titles.

- Primary domain: https://acerteamosca.com.br
- English domain: https://nailedthefly.com
- Languages: pt-BR, en

## Games

- [Acerte a Mosca](https://acerteamosca.com.br/jogos/acerteamosca): Reflex arcade game — swat the mosquito with a slipper
- [Pong](https://acerteamosca.com.br/jogos/pong): Classic Pong with CPU, local, and online multiplayer
- [Ships](https://acerteamosca.com.br/jogos/ships): Space navigation maze with ricocheting shots and online multiplayer
- [Wordle](https://acerteamosca.com.br/jogos/wordle): Word guessing game (5 letters, 6 attempts) in Portuguese and English
- [Memory](https://acerteamosca.com.br/jogos/memory): Matching pairs card game with online multiplayer
- [2048](https://acerteamosca.com.br/jogos/2048): Sliding number puzzle with solo and online multiplayer modes
- [Bubble Shooter](https://acerteamosca.com.br/jogos/bubbleshooter): Bubble popping arcade game
- [Deep Attack](https://acerteamosca.com.br/jogos/deepattack): Space shooter with alien enemies
- [Jacare](https://acerteamosca.com.br/jogos/jacare): Frogger-style crossing game
- [Tiro ao Alvo](https://acerteamosca.com.br/jogos/tiroaoalvo): Target shooting reflex game
- [Batalha Naval](https://acerteamosca.com.br/jogos/batalha-naval): Battleship strategy game with CPU or online multiplayer
- [Brick Breaker](https://acerteamosca.com.br/jogos/brickbreaker): Arkanoid-style brick breaking — 25 stages across 5 worlds
- [3INVADER](https://acerteamosca.com.br/jogos/3invader): Space shooter — 25 stages, 5 worlds, 5 epic bosses

## Features

- No download or registration required
- Works on mobile and desktop browsers
- Online multiplayer for Pong, Ships, Memory, 2048, and Batalha Naval
- PWA support — installable as an app
- Retro pixel art aesthetic

## Technical

- Framework: Next.js 14 (App Router) + React 18
- Rendering: Pixi.js for 2D game graphics
- Multiplayer: WebSocket servers for real-time gameplay
- Database: Prisma ORM
- i18n: next-intl with pt-BR and en locales
